title: Why did unit 00 turn into a gnr
display_title: Why did unit 00 turn into a gnr
wikitext:
[]: Why did unit 00 turn into a gnr?             Quote Post by Duke » Sun Feb 01, 2009 10:55 pm In episode 23... Right before unit 00 completely explodes, it turns into a gnr. Why is this?

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sun Feb 01, 2009 10:57 pm It's an Angel Tower, it's in the EvaPedia.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Mon Feb 02, 2009 12:27 am Plot device, Mr. Frodo. Plot device!

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Feb 02, 2009 12:38 am No, I think he meant this. AS for why...I got as much of a clue as you do.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Mon Feb 02, 2009 1:01 am GNR is there because it looks cool.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Mon Feb 02, 2009 7:59 am Action_Bastard wrote: No, I think he meant this. I don't remember that...

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Feb 02, 2009 8:20 am I don't remember that...

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Mon Feb 02, 2009 8:32 am yeah, I mean the Giant Rei from the instant before unit 00 explodes.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Feb 02, 2009 10:02 am Most might not remember it because it was added to the director's cut of eva. **Gif of scene

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Feb 02, 2009 10:30 am That always puzzled me as well...

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Feb 02, 2009 1:24 pm My interpretation is that through fusion with Armisarael Rei2 is reunited with the part of her soul that was 'sheared' into unit 00, becoming Lilith. Lilith reorganizes the PWM of unit 00 into a suitible new body while Armi' is apparently forced out, but both are destroyed by the self destruct mechanism.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Feb 02, 2009 2:19 pm That would make sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 03, 2009 8:34 am NemZ wrote: My interpretation is that through fusion with Armisarael Rei2 is reunited with the part of her soul that was 'sheared' into unit 00, becoming Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by Annihilationscape » Tue Feb 03, 2009 11:41 am And where did the armor and umbilical cable go?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Feb 03, 2009 1:38 pm Reichu wrote: Not so much "Lilith" as "a giant naked white Rei". Unless you propose that Lilith, at this point, has started to identify herself as a giant, naked white Rei, or something. And where did the armor and umbilical cable go?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Feb 03, 2009 1:50 pm NemZ wrote: It does seem to be her form of choice later...

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Feb 03, 2009 2:07 pm The real answer is that Anno thought it would look cool and be vague enough to motivate hard-core fans to buy yet another version to see the new scene and argue about it for another decade or so.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Tue Feb 03, 2009 2:29 pm NemZ wins twice. I's always thought it was meant to 'symbolically' show Rei becoming whole, not literally, hence the poetic-like fadeout effect. I mean, if Rei could actually make Eva00 turn into a giant version of herself why does that mean Yui do the same with Eva01? (I just totally got the mental image of GNR fighting a giant nude Yui. Awesome) The whole last section pretty much just shows Rei = Eva00.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Feb 03, 2009 3:31 pm I figured it was symbolism (or showing what's happening underneath the armor) of Rei's soul becoming whole (most of it was in Rei2 and part in Eva-00 as Rei1), as well.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Tue Feb 03, 2009 3:57 pm ^ Yes.
